name: pgats-2026-tcd-ci
description: Gerador de senhas seguro com arquitetura MVC e testes automatizados.

scripts.postcypress:run: mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/.jsons/*.json > cypress/reports/cypress-e2e-report.json && marge cypress/reports/cypress-e2e-report.json -o cypress/reports/ --reportFilename index
scripts.ci:local: npm test && start-server-and-test 'npx http-server src -p 5500' http://localhost:5500 'npm run cypress:run'

author: Eduardo Antero
